title: Converting T-SQL code to PL/pgSQL with confidence
summary: Google Cloud demonstrates using Gemini as an AI tutor to convert T-SQL procedures to PL/pgSQL code for developers migrating databases to PostgreSQL. The tool explains conversions including refactoring to Common Table Expressions, helping developers build PostgreSQL expertise.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech shows how to use Gemini as an AI tutor for converting T-SQL stored procedures into PL/pgSQL during database migrations to PostgreSQL. The tool explains each conversion as it goes, including refactoring queries into Common Table Expressions. The aim is not just translated code but transferred knowledge, with developers building PostgreSQL expertise through the explanations rather than relying on opaque output.
